overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city. The scene transitions from a dark underpass to a sunlit flooded street lined with neon signs and holographic billboards, then continues along a waterfront path under elevated highways past market stalls and commercial storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: emerging from deep shadow of overpass into bright sunlight
character steps from dry pavement into shallow flood water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway toward the bright exit, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the light

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating deep shadow overhead
red and green food vendor stall with glowing 'BURRITO' neon signage
various glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building walls
tall glass and steel cyberpunk tower with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark covered walkway beneath a massive concrete overpass. The camera follows a pedestrian ahead toward a bright exit where sunlight streams in. A colorful food stand with neon signage sits to the left. As the character approaches the opening, the lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sun, revealing a flooded street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with holographic advertisements

events.description: pedestrian passes close to camera on the right, temporarily blocking view
camera pans to reveal large holographic billboard standing in the flood water

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow flood water toward a large holographic billboard, surveying the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: character in tactical clothing walking ahead through the water toward the billboard

entered.detail: large floating advertisement displaying 'COMBAT CAB 35% OFF' with a figure in tactical gear
shallow water covering the entire street surface with reflections of buildings
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars and wires
multi-level concrete highway structure spanning across the background

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide flooded street bathed in bright morning sunlight. The character wades through shallow water toward a massive holographic billboard advertising Combat Cab. Industrial power towers rise in the distance while glass skyscrapers line the right side. A pedestrian passes close by the camera as the view opens up to the expansive cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront market area with mixed traditional and futuristic architecture

events.description: camera pans left to reveal bustling market stalls and asian-inspired architecture along the waterfront
flying vehicle passes overhead in the sky above the market area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while panning camera to observe the market area and flying traffic overhead

notable_agents.action: flying car or airship with blue and white coloring moving across the sky above the market

entered.detail: colorful market buildings with red paper lanterns and traditional curved roofing
staircase leading down from the walkway to the water's edge
weathered concrete and metal barriers along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to reveal a vibrant waterfront market area featuring traditional Asian architecture mixed with cyberpunk elements. Red lanterns hang from market stalls while a flying vehicle cruises overhead. The character continues along the water's edge, passing concrete stairs and rusted barriers. The industrial power tower now appears centered in the background as the Combat Cab billboard recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highways with commercial storefronts

events.description: green military truck drives past on the right side of the walkway
character turns slightly to navigate around oncoming pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under elevated highways, passing other pedestrians and observing storefronts

notable_agents.action: green military-style truck driving along the road next to the sidewalk
pedestrian in red jacket and white shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
large holographic advertisement featuring a pink cat face with glowing eyes
various shops with glowing signs including 'All Foods' and directional neon arrows
curved metal railing separating the sidewalk from the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under the elevated highway overpasses where the lighting becomes a mix of sun and shadow. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk next to a metal guardrail, passing various commercial storefronts with bright neon signage. A large holographic cat billboard dominates the center view while a green military truck drives past on the right. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera continues through this covered urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed urban underpass into a sun-drenched flooded district before returning to the dappled light of a covered commercial corridor. It begins in a dark covered walkway beneath a concrete overpass, following a pedestrian toward a bright exit past a neon-lit food stand. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into a wide, flooded street bathed in morning sunlight, where the view expands to reveal glass skyscrapers and a massive holographic Combat Cab billboard. The perspective then pans left toward a vibrant waterfront market featuring red lanterns and traditional Asian architecture, with a flying vehicle cruising overhead as the camera tracks along the water's edge. Finally, the movement shifts back under the elevated highway overpasses, passing commercial storefronts and a large holographic cat billboard while a green military truck drives past in the mixed light of sun and shadow.
